'''鈭歞-d-ch-sh''' ('''kadadcheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbloat|unbloat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbloat|unbloat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-d-ch-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadadcheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidadcheshoko|thidadcheshoko]] || [[word:jidadcheshoko|jidadcheshoko]] || [[word:shidadcheshoko|shidadcheshoko]] || [[word:kidadcheshoko|kidadcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudadcheshoko|thuthudadcheshoko]] || [[word:jujudadcheshoko|jujudadcheshoko]] || [[word:shushudadcheshoko|shushudadcheshoko]] || [[word:kukudadcheshoko|kukudadcheshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
